name: Drumsticks Diable
recipeInstructions:
1. Shake drumsticks in a plastic bag with flour, 1/4 cup of salt, and the pepper.
2. Brown in butter or margarine in a large skillet or an electric slow cooker; remove.
3. Stir tomatoes, brown sugar, vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, chili powder, dry mustard, celery seeds, garlic, and red pepper seasoning into pan drippings; bring to boiling.
4. Combine drumsticks and sauce in slow cooker; cover.
5. Cook on low for 8 hours or on high for 4 hours, or until chicken is tender. Serve with spaghetti. Sweet and spicy.
